taglineHeader: Banking that meets you where you are
homeHeadline: Confidence for every milestone—today and years from now.
homeSubtext: Manage everyday spending, plan major purchases, and grow long-term wealth in one streamlined experience designed around your goals.
signInDisclaimer: Sign in with your 10-digit Internet Banking ID or the email you used when you enrolled, plus your password. For your security, avoid shared or public computers when possible, and sign out when you are finished.
supportHoursLine: 24/7 for card loss and fraud. Banking specialists 8am–10pm ET.
legalDemoFooter: is a Member FDIC institution and an Equal Housing Lender. Deposits are insured up to applicable limits. Products, rates, and fees are subject to change and are subject to approval. Review current disclosures before opening an account or establishing credit.
mobileDepositEndorsement: For mobile deposit only, Bywells Bank.
wireAuthLine: By selecting Confirm, you authorize the bank to move this amount between your selected accounts.
wireDisclaimerFees: Wire transfer fees, cutoffs, and delivery times vary by product and destination. Amounts shown reflect the fee schedule in effect for your account type; confirm totals before you authorize.

emailLetters.otpInnerHtml:
{{greetingLine}}

Use this one-time code to verify your identity when signing in to Online Banking:

{{code}}

This code expires in {{expiryMinutes}} minutes. If you did not attempt to sign in, contact Fraud immediately at {{supportPhoneFraud}} or {{supportEmail}}.
emailLetters.emailChangeInnerHtml:
{{greetingLine}}

Use this one-time code to confirm that you own this email address for Online Banking notifications and sign-in:

{{code}}

This code expires in {{expiryMinutes}} minutes. If you did not request an email change, contact Fraud at {{supportPhoneFraud}} or {{supportEmail}}.
emailLetters.kycNotifyInnerHtml:
A customer has submitted identity documents through Online Banking.

Submission ID{{submissionId}}
Customer name{{displayName}}
Customer email{{customerEmail}}

Review this package in the operator console under KYC verification.
emailLetters.testInnerHtml:
{{greetingLine}}

This is an automated test message confirming that outbound email is configured correctly for {{bankName}} Online Banking notifications.

If you requested this test, no further action is required. Otherwise, contact {{supportEmail}}.
emailLetters.wireTransferOtpInnerHtml:
{{greetingLine}}

Use this one-time code to authorize an outgoing wire transfer request from Online Banking:

{{code}}

This code expires in {{expiryMinutes}} minutes. If you did not request a wire transfer, contact Fraud immediately at {{supportPhoneFraud}} or {{supportEmail}}.
